Our Clinic

Experience luxury and comfort at our state-of-the-art facility in Gunjur, Bangalore

Meet Dr. Shifa M.E

Dr. Shifa is a dedicated Consultant Dermatologist with specialized expertise in both clinical and cosmetic dermatology. She brings a wealth of knowledge and compassion to every patient interaction.

At Lumi Clinic, we believe in a holistic approach to skin and hair health — combining medical science with aesthetic artistry to deliver natural-looking, lasting results.

Our clinic in Gunjur, Bangalore is equipped with the latest FDA-approved technologies and follows the highest standards of hygiene and patient care.

Qualifications MBBS, DVD — Consultant Dermatologist
